signal_title: Online Safety Amendment (Social Media Minimum Age) Act 2024
risk_rationale: The new legislation in Australia establishes a minimum age of 16 for social media access, which conflicts with TikTok's current global default minimum registration age of 13. This represents a material compliance gap requiring immediate product changes to comply with the new legal requirements.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Minimum registration age is 13 years globally.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Establishes a minimum age of 16 for social media access.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The new Australian legislation requires a higher minimum age for access than TikTok's current policy, necessitating changes to age-gating mechanisms in Australia.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: No specific age verification measures are detailed.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The legislation mandates age verification measures, which TikTok must implement to ensure compliance.

remediations.title: Update Minimum Age Requirement for Australia
remediations.description: Implement changes to the registration process to enforce a minimum age of 16 for users in Australia. This includes updating the age-gating logic and ensuring compliance with local regulations.
acceptance_criteria: Users in Australia cannot register if they are under 16.
Age verification measures are in place and operational for new and existing users in Australia.

remediations.title: Implement Age Verification Measures
remediations.description: Develop and deploy age verification mechanisms to comply with the new Australian legislation. This may include third-party verification services or enhanced identity checks.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification measures are implemented and effective for all users in Australia.
Verification process is seamless and does not significantly impact user experience.

business_impact: Failure to comply with the new legislation could result in significant fines or restrictions on TikTok's operations in Australia, impacting user growth and engagement in the region.
recommended_actions: Prioritize the development and implementation of age verification measures for the Australian market.
Communicate upcoming changes to Australian users and provide guidance on the new registration requirements.
Engage with Australian regulatory bodies to ensure ongoing compliance and address any potential concerns.
